text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
People are crowding in front of the<n>central plaza.
I'm curious, so I go to<n>check it out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Ah... Hello, darling p-pony.<n>Whaddya
wanna—I mean... Is there<n>anything that might be
bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Uh, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This darkening of your lovely eyes<n>must mean...
Uh, you'd like me to<n>stop...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The hell are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Brian! Your... your hair is looking<n>lovely today!
So lovely... that I want to<n>take you on, one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Come here a minute.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So why the Fuji impersonation all of<n>a sudden?
Thought you hated acting<n>all dramatic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but this is... I have my reasons,<n>all right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
See, that student back there lives in<n>my dorm. She
always seems worried<n>about something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She opened up to Fuji, apparently,but as her dorm leader, I'msupposed to be the one she goes to!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Does she really not trust me? What<n>kinda leader
am I if no one feels like<n>they can talk to me?
Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh right! What did ya think of my<n>performance?
Did I seem more<n>trustworthy 'cause I was acting
like<n>Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You've lost it lately. The Ama I know<n>wouldn't try
to be someone else.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What happened to all that passion<n>you show in
your races? No way<n>you're giving anyone advice
like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
At least I wouldn't think to lean on<n>someone
who's forgotten how to be<n>herself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's harsh, but... you're right. I was<n>trying silly
tricks when I shoulda<n>faced my problem head-on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks for the wake-up call. It's<n>time to solve
this properly!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, Hishi Amazon resolves her<n>resident's
problem, and seems<n>delighted when more
students start<n>coming to her for help afterwards.
